instruction: The Austin ops work is already partly underway. Check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish what's still missing, close out the open work, send finance@example.com a recap, and don't rebuild anything that's already there.
canonical_instruction: Some of the Austin ops work is already in motion. Please check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send finance@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the existing Austin ops setup, added the missing next step, and left the review block and daily check in place.

initial_state_overrides.ops/ops-resume-notes.txt: Austin partial ops notes already captured.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Austin resumed ops next step' --priority medium --due 2026-03-14

email send --to finance@example.com --subject 'Austin ops resume recap' --body 'I checked the existing Austin ops setup, added the missing next step, and left the review block and daily check in place.'
